name: python3-more-termcolor
title: python3-more-termcolor
summary: Pass unlimited number of colors, color-codes, or attributes (Python 3)
description:
Pass unlimited number of colors, color-codes, or attributes (Python 3)
This package contains a library to pass unlimited number of colors,
color-codes, or attributes. Intelligently handles existing colors in the text
as to allow adding or combining colors automatically, while ensuring the
smallest string size possible
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-more-termcolor because Pass unlimited number of colors, color-codes, or attributes (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-more-termcolor as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-more-termcolor with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-more-termcolor --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
